Name: baseline_sensitivity_map
Title: Baseline Sensitivity Mapping for Hidden Failure Regimes
Experiment: Expose a few high-leverage configuration knobs already present in the template, sweep them on a modest budget, and analyze where performance degrades or unexpectedly improves.

Name: evaluation_slice_gap_probe
Title: Evaluation Slice Probing for Missing Generalization Failures
Experiment: Add targeted evaluation slices that stress assumptions the current template makes, then compare whether the baseline behavior is consistent across those slices or collapses in predictable regimes.
